raw_consumer_statement:
I ordered furniture from XXXX XXXX. No furniture was delivered. I cancelled the furniture order within 3 days and requested a credit to put back on my credit card that XXXX XXXX had charged. No credit was returned to my Citi Credit Card. 

I disputed the charge with Citi Cards and a couple week later they finally credit my account for the {$5000.00}. Then Citi Cards allowed XXXX XXXX to charge another {$5000.00} to my account after the credit had been give. Still no furniture or no order. Citi Card should not have allowed the {$5000.00} charge.

I disputed this again and Citi Card still shows that I owe the {$5000.00}. I'm XXXX XXXX XXXX and feel like Citi Card and XXXX XXXX are taking advantage of me because of my age.
